title: taraxacum epacrum
intro: Taraxacum epacrum, also known as dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and liver-protective effects, which are attributed to its high content of taraxasterol and other sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Taraxacum epacrum include its ability to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Taraxacum epacrum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
